data.title: Genpact research shows 12% leading shift to autonomous enterprise with key enablers. NY, Jan.13, 2026.
data.description: Recent studies identify four key factors that facilitate the transition from experimenting with artificial intelligence to establishing the groundwork for an autonomous enterprise. The findings were presented by Genpact (NYSE: G), a prominent provider of cutting-edge technology solutions, based in New York. The report, published on January 13, 2026, highlights essential strategies for organizations seeking to evolve their AI capabilities.

data.title: NYSE reports pre-market updates and banking giants starting earnings season. JD Durkin delivers news on Jan 13.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update via PRNewswire. Traders can obtain valuable market insights directly from the NYSE Trading Floor before the start of trading. The pre-market update for that day was presented by JD Durkin.

data.title: Premier Plus Lending appoints Mike Pandazos as Director of Strategic Growth, enhancing expansion in California.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 13, 2026, Premier Plus Lending (PPL) welcomed Mike Pandazos as the Director of Strategic Growth. This new appointment aims to bolster the company's growth efforts and cement its status in California. This move underscores PPL's commitment to expanding its operations and enhancing its market presence.

data.title: Fidelity predicts bright future for Bitcoin in 2026 as it matures. Will it reach its potential?
data.description: The financial services firm has presented a clear bullish outlook for Bitcoin as it continues to grow. The firm is optimistic about the potential for Bitcoin to rise in value as it evolves. Will this optimistic perspective on Bitcoin's future become a reality?

data.title: JPMorgan reported Q4 2025 net income of $13B ($4.63 per share), exceeding analyst estimates with $46.8B revenue. Loans and deposits saw significant growth. Markets revenue increased by 17%. ROE was 17%, ROTCE - 20%. $4.7B provision for credit losses.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. reported its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings, with a net income of $13.0 billion ($4.63 per share), down 7% Y/Y, and adjusted earnings per share of $5.23, beating the $4.92 analyst estimate. The managed net revenue was $46.8 billion, higher than the expected $46.02 billion. Net interest income excluding Markets reached $23.9 billion, up 4% Y/Y. Noninterest revenue (excluding Markets) rose 7% Y/Y to $14.7 billion. Markets revenue grew 17% Y/Y to $8.2 billion. The firm reported a return on equity of 17% and a return on tangible common equity of 20% for fiscal year 2025. Cash and marketable securities totaled $1.5 trillion. Average loans and deposits increased 9% and 6% Y/Y respectively. The provision for credit losses was $4.7 billion. Net charge-offs were $2.5 billion. JPMorgan Chase posted strong financial performance in various segments, despite some declines in specific areas.

data.title: Evercore ISI initiates Reddit stock with buy rating due to advertising growth potential and AI potential. (Characters: 99)
data.description: A financial firm, Evercore ISI, has started covering Reddit's stock, giving it a buy rating due to its promising advertising growth prospects. The company believes that Reddit has the potential for significant growth in this area. The coverage was published in an article titled "Reddit Stock Initiated With Buy Call On Bullish Advertising Growth, AI Potential" on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Delta Air Lines announces Q4 earnings, 2026 guidance, and Boeing deal in response to increasing demand.
data.description: On Tuesday, Delta Air Lines revealed its fourth-quarter earnings and provided guidance for 2026, while also announcing a significant deal with Boeing. The company's latest financial report and forward-looking projections suggest positive results, with an emphasis on the increasing demand in the aviation industry. This news underscores Delta's strategic moves as it navigates a changing market landscape. The Boeing deal and projected figures for 2026 point towards an optimistic outlook for the airline, reflecting its efforts to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the sector.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase and Bank of New York Mellon's earnings results diverge, trading tightly ahead of quarterly reports.
data.description: Leading financial institutions JPMorgan Chase and Bank of New York Mellon are experiencing contrasting trading patterns as they approach a significant week filled with quarterly bank earnings reports. While JPMorgan Chase is maintaining stability in its trading activity, Bank of New York Mellon is diverging in its performance. Investors are closely watching these developments as they anticipate the upcoming announcements from both banks. This information was not disclosed by the Investor's Business Daily, where the news was originally published.

data.title: Dow falls on inflation report; Delta stock plunges on earnings news.ibile's Daily.
data.description: After a surprising CPI inflation report, the Dow Jones index experienced a reversal on Tuesday. Delta stock plummeted following its earnings announcement. The stock market today saw the Dow reversing due to the unexpected inflation report and Delta's dive in earnings. Live coverage of the events was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: New Charter Technologies acquires NetSource One, boosting expertise in regulated industries and security-first services.
data.description: A technology solutions provider from Michigan has bolstered New Charter Technologies, enhancing their capabilities in regulated industries and security-focused services. The announcement was made on Jan. 13, 2026, in Denver. New Charter Technologies, backed by Oval Partners, a private equity firm from Palo Alto, disclosed the partnership.

data.title: Tineco earns global media recognition at CES 2026 for its Modern Living vision, highlighting thoughtful design and intelligent performance.
data.description: With its thoughtful design, intelligent performance, and everyday relevance, Tineco emerged as one of the standout brands at CES 2026 in Seattle. The event, held on January 13, 2026, showcased Tineco's Modern Living vision, capturing the attention of the global media. The brand's innovative approach impressed many, leading to increased recognition and praise. Tineco's presence at CES 2026 highlighted its position as a leading player in the industry, setting the stage for further success in the market.

data.title: Nullspace Inc. releases new software for antennas and radar simulations, providing up to 100x faster frequency analysis and removing CAD cleanup bottleneck. Huntsville, Ala., Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: Nullspace Inc., an engineering software company based in Huntsville, Alabama, has recently introduced a new release on January 13, 2026, which promises a significant improvement in frequency analysis speed - now up to 100 times faster. This advancement aims to address the bottleneck in CAD cleanup for complex RF system simulations. The company's focus on modernizing simulation software for mission-critical RF applications underscores the importance of efficiency in this sector.

data.title: ACR Poker's MOSS returns in January with $2M guaranteed across 50 events with up to $250K prize, appealing to all players.
data.description: ACR Poker's Mini Online Super Series (MOSS) is back with 50 events featuring low buy-ins and high guarantees of up to $250,000. Running for three weeks starting January 11th, this series is tailored to cater to players with varying bankrolls. The MOSS events provide an opportunity for participants to compete in a range of games and potentially win significant cash prizes.

data.title: Tata Elxsi sees 3.9% QoQ revenue growth in Q3 FY'26, EBITDA margin up by 220 bps. Stock symbols: BSE: 500408, NSE: TATAELXSI.
data.description: Tata Elxsi, a prominent provider of design-led technology services based in Bengaluru, India, disclosed its third quarter results for 2026. The company experienced a 3.9% quarter-on-quarter growth in revenue from operations. Additionally, the EBITDA margin saw a significant increase of 220 basis points. This indicates a positive trend in the company's financial performance.

data.title: OneView Commerce recognized among Best Places to Work in 2026. Named one of the best remote companies nationwide and top startup in Boston.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, OneView Commerce was listed among the top remote companies nationwide and identified as one of the finest startups in Boston. The company has been acknowledged by Built In as one of the Best Places to Work in 2026. This recognition highlights OneView's commitment to providing a positive work environment. This achievement showcases the company's success and dedication to its employees.

data.title: BNY Mellon reports Q4 2025 EPS of $2.08, revenue at $5.179B, net income of $1.427B and AUC near $60T.
data.description: BNY Mellon reported a strong fourth quarter in 2025 with diluted earnings per common share of $2.02 and adjusted EPS of $2.08, surpassing the analyst estimate of $1.98. Total revenue increased by 7% to $5.179 billion, driven by fee revenue of $3.698 billion (up 5%) and net interest income of $1.346 billion (up 13%). Net income applicable to common shareholders rose by 26% to $1.427 billion. The pre-tax operating margin was 36%, return on equity at 14.5%, and return on tangible common equity at 26.6%. Notable noninterest expenses were $51 million, primarily due to severance costs. Non-interest expenses were flat at $3.360 billion year-over-year, or up 4% excluding notable items. There was a benefit of $26 million in provision for credit losses, driven by improvements in commercial real estate exposure and macroeconomic changes. The effective tax rate stood at 20.4%.

data.title: The Red Chickz signs 3-unit franchise deal in Maryland with operators Sam Patel and Sister Phalguni. Expanding to East Coast.
data.description: Experienced operator Sam Patel, along with Sister Phalguni, have introduced The Red Chickz to Maryland. This popular West Coast hot chicken spot, recognized for its unique spin on Nashville Heat, is expanding to the East Coast. The move to Maryland signifies a new venture for the brand and will likely attract attention from those eager to try its renowned crunchy and spicy offerings.

data.title: Cohere Health experiences record growth in 2025 due to increased adoption of clinical intelligence by health plans, reflecting demand for AI to enhance collaboration and accuracy in healthcare operations.
data.description: Increased adoption of clinically trained, domain-specific AI indicates a rising need for improving payer-provider collaboration, prior authorization processes, and payment accuracy. This trend was observed in Boston on January 13, 2026. Cohere Health®, a key player in providing clinical intelligence solutions for health plans, is at the forefront of this movement. The growing demand for such solutions is evident in the significant numbers of health plans opting for these services.

data.title: GFL Environmental Inc. plans a private offering of $1 billion in senior notes.
data.description: In Vaughan, Ontario on January 13, 2026, GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) (TSX: GFL) revealed its intention to launch a private offering known as the "Notes Offering." This offering, valued at US$1 billion in aggregate principal amount, is contingent on various factors including market conditions.
